_metadata.description: Navico aftermarket replacement parts catalog — used by 03a-PartsProducts.ps1 to provision parts price list

priceList.name: Navico Aftermarket Parts & Accessories
priceList.description: Replacement parts, accessories, and service components for Lowrance, Simrad, B&G, C-MAP, and Northstar products. Used by CS agents for Quick Quote on parts orders.

notes: Parts flagged cr74e_parts=true so Quick Quote filters to parts-only price list
Prices are representative MSRP — adjust per current navico.com / dealer portal pricing

parts.name: Lowrance Active Imaging 3-in-1 Transducer
parts.description: Active Imaging 3-in-1 transducer with CHIRP sonar, SideScan, and DownScan. Compatible with HDS Live, HDS Carbon, Elite FS series.

parts.name: Lowrance ActiveTarget 2 Transducer Head
parts.description: Replacement transducer head for ActiveTarget 2 live sonar system. Scans Forward, Scout, and Down modes.

parts.name: Lowrance 7-Pin Power/Data Cable 6ft
parts.description: OEM 7-pin power and data cable for HDS and Elite series units. 6-foot length.

parts.name: Lowrance HDS Live Gimbal Bracket Mount
parts.description: OEM gimbal bracket mounting kit for HDS Live 9/12/16. Includes hardware.

parts.name: Lowrance Point-1 GPS/GLONASS Antenna
parts.description: High-sensitivity GPS/GLONASS antenna with 10Hz update rate. Compatible with HDS and NSS series.

parts.name: Lowrance HDS Live 12 Sun Cover
parts.description: Protective sun cover for HDS Live 12-inch display. UV resistant.

parts.name: Simrad TotalScan Transom Mount Transducer
parts.description: TotalScan transducer with CHIRP, SideScan, and DownScan. Compatible with NSS evo3S and GO Series.

parts.name: Simrad Halo24 Radar Dome Pedestal Cable 10m
parts.description: OEM 10-meter pedestal cable for Halo24 radar dome. Pre-assembled connector.

parts.name: Simrad AP44 Drive Unit Interface Module
parts.description: Drive unit interface module for AP44 autopilot. Required for hydraulic and mechanical drive installations.

parts.name: Simrad SimNet to NMEA 2000 Adapter Cable
parts.description: Adapter cable to connect SimNet devices to NMEA 2000 network backbone. 1-meter length.

parts.name: Simrad RS90S Replacement Handset
parts.description: OEM replacement handset for RS90S Class D VHF Radio. DSC and GMDSS compatible.

parts.name: B&G Masthead Unit — Wind Sensor Replacement
parts.description: Replacement masthead wind sensor for H5000 and Zeus systems. Includes ultrasonic wind speed/direction measurement.

parts.name: B&G Triton2 Display Replacement Screen
parts.description: Replacement display module for Triton2 instrument display. Sunlight-readable LCD panel.

parts.name: B&G H5000 Processor Power Cable
parts.description: OEM power cable for H5000 processor unit. 2-meter, waterproof connector.

parts.name: B&G Zeus S 12 Flush Mount Kit
parts.description: Flush mount installation kit for Zeus S 12-inch chartplotter. Gasket, hardware, and trim ring included.

parts.name: C-MAP REVEAL Coastal Chart Card — East US
parts.description: C-MAP REVEAL high-resolution chart card covering East US coastline. Annual subscription included.

parts.name: C-MAP DISCOVER Inland Lakes Chart Card
parts.description: C-MAP DISCOVER chart card for inland lakes and rivers. Includes fishing contours and marina data.

parts.name: C-MAP Genesis Sonar Log SD Card 32GB
parts.description: 32GB SD card pre-formatted for C-MAP Genesis sonar logging. Compatible with all Navico MFDs with SD slot.

parts.name: Northstar VHF Antenna SO-239 Connector
parts.description: Replacement SO-239 antenna connector for legacy Northstar VHF radios. Fits models 960/961/965.

parts.name: Northstar GPS Antenna Cable 5m
parts.description: 5-meter GPS antenna extension cable for legacy Northstar GPS/chartplotter units.

parts.name: Navico Network Cable NMEA 2000 T-Connector
parts.description: NMEA 2000 micro T-connector. Universal compatibility across Lowrance, Simrad, and B&G networks.

parts.name: Navico NMEA 2000 Power Cable with Fuse
parts.description: NMEA 2000 network power cable with inline 3A fuse. Required for network backbone power.

parts.name: Navico 16GB microSD Card (Official)
parts.description: Official Navico-branded 16GB microSD card. Pre-formatted for use with all Navico MFDs. Software updates and chart storage.
